reviews.review_description: I love the gun mechanics but whenever I go in the game it instantly gets laggy and then it stops and it sometimes lags in the middle of the game.
The gun system is cool and rlly it I can say about this game since its a demo version Might buy the full one, one day

developer_response.body: Thank you very much - I'm glad you like it! The full game now has more than 50 guns to try!

reviews.review_description: It's a good game but I want MORE weapons pls add more. Thank yaa

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! The full game now has more than 50 weapons!

reviews.review_title: This gives me sorta a H3VR Vibe
reviews.review_description: I like the feel of the weapons but not all that much. I’m not sure if the full version has better handeling but if this game were to better the graphics/Lighting, and add a better interaction system I think this could be a big game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! If you have anything specific you would like to see improved about the weapon handling please let me know, and I'll see what I can do! The graphics are simplified to keep framerates and bullet simulation accuracy as high as possible, but I try to improve whatever I can.
Thanks for your review - I'm sorry you didn't enjoy this limited demo.

reviews.review_title: Get this before you get the full game
reviews.review_description: I loved this game so much but  definitely not for everyone, I bought the full game the next morning lol (See my other review)

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review! Much appreciated!

reviews.review_title: amazing game but has a problom
reviews.review_description: good game in all just i wish it was multiplayer and that there was more guns. also that person,there needs to be more.🗿

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! I've added more scarecrows, and the full game GUNS has loads more weapons and spawnable scarecrow monsters!

reviews.review_description: It's fun; so many things you can do, it's just crazy. Make more games like this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, much appreciated!

reviews.review_description: Fun fun fun fun fun fun fun

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review - I'm glad you like it!

reviews.review_description: Il like it but it woud be fun if you added a delete all or respawn guns button

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and for the suggestion! Reset button has now been added in the recent update!

reviews.review_description: For the small amount of things you can do this game is fun makes me want to buy The full version of the game I recommend . Also I think they should add pigs that run around and you can shoot just like the chickens

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Hogs are added now!

reviews.review_description: There’s basically nothing to do, It’s just 3 guns and targets.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment! Sorry you did not like the target shooting in this limited demo of the game GUNS.

reviews.review_description: Some things I think you should add are arms instead of the oculus controllers maybe also some zombie full body targets that could kill you anyway that's all from me great game excited for updates in the future

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, and thank you very much for the suggestions - much appreciated! In the full game I have added scarecrow/zombie targets (GUNS - www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/8960111530681079/), and they will attack you in the next update! MIght put a friendly one in the demo, too. Arms are complex in the current framework, so can't promise anything with that for now. If you have any other suggestions, please let me know! Either here or on the Reddit page (r/gunsgame).

reviews.review_description: Me and my friend like shooters where we can have small battles for Pavlov shack vr is our favourite one so far we are looking for more WE WANT ONLINE

Having been a competitive shooter for years, I was looking forward to trying this out. I found the controls were unintuitive and a little clumsy.    I have uninstalled for now, and will wait until things are a little more developed and intuitive. The layout and general idea are pretty good. I look forward to a more developed demo, and if all goes well, the purchase of the full version.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Controls are improved now - I hope you like them better if you try the demo again!

reviews.review_description: This game is a good idea but the reloading is weird. And the guns don’t redrawn or any thing. Every gun I reload takes like a minute it’s complicated. Please add something where you can highlight what to do to reload.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! The latest version (0.311) has a control change, where one button press on X or A drops the magazine, and the next press reloads and readies the weapon. Manual reloads can of course still be done. I hope you'll like it! Any other ideas or suggestions are welcome here or at reddit.com/gunsgame .

reviews.review_description: Quick to start and shoot a few mags. Graphics are simple but gun behaviour is pretty accurate. Good that you can move the clay pigeon launcher around (and shoot it to restart!) to set up new challenges.
